title: senecio oreophyton
intro: Senecio oreophyton, also known as the Western Groundsel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio oreophyton include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
